stemHtml: During your approach, ATC asks you to perform a circle-to-land manoeuvre due to an unexpectedly strong tailwind. After the downwind leg, you make the last turn to the final approach with a strong headwind. In comparison to an approach in still air, you should (1) _____ thrust to stay on the correct glide path, as the headwind will cause the aircraft's glide angle to (2) _____.
